descs.desc: If target has 7+ Tremor Count, Final Power +1
coinDescs: [OnSucceedAttack] If target has 5+ [Vibration], inflict 1 Attack Power Down next turn

[OnSucceedAttack] Trigger [VibrationExplosion]
When triggering [VibrationExplosion], reduce Tremor Count by 3, then spend all Charge Count to further raise Stagger Threshold by (Charge Count x 5)% (Max 50%)

1050501.name: Chronic Fatigue
1050501.desc:
In a clash, the opponent has -1 Clash Power if they have 5+ Tremor.
When recovering from Stagger, heal 5% of Max HP.

1050521.name: Leave by Suggestion
1050521.desc: 1 ally with the fastest Speed lowers the Clash Power of opponents with Tremor by 1.
